title: Notifications - Device charging OFF
scenario: Device Charging notification does not appear when disabled in Poly Lens Menu > Notifications & Device Alerts while app is in background and headset is connected to charger
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Device Settings → Notifications & Device Alerts.
4. Locate the 'Device Charging' toggle and ensure it is turned OFF.
5. Press the Home button on the Android device to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
6. Connect the headset to a charger (e.g., via USB cable or charging cradle).
7. Observe the Android notification shade for any incoming notifications.
expected: No "Charging" notification appears in the Android notification shade when the headset is connected to a charger while the app is in the background.
